rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use valid component type scopes for component ports referenced in AGREE contracts
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Maintain consistent scope and visibility rules when inserting annex blocks
Preserve existing component and implementation boundaries during fusion
Ensure inserted annex blocks do not introduce new architectural dependencies
Validate that inserted annex blocks do not violate existing AADL constraints
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, and constants
Ensure proper use of AGREE logical operators in contracts
Maintain consistent naming conventions for AGREE identifiers
Preserve existing AADL property associations and their values
anti_patterns: Avoid inserting annex blocks that reference non-visible identifiers
Do not modify existing AADL component or implementation definitions
Avoid introducing new architectural dependencies through annex blocks
Do not use implementation-only paths in component type annex contracts
